name: DM DOKURO

i think you already know why I'm making this.

Anyways, I was curious of DOKURO was on here and would you know it, he isn't. If you read my bio, I typically make bots of unmade characters, however, that list is VERY limited, so if you have any suggestions, I'll figure out how to make a request box.
